sentence: 他决定向朋友的餐厅入股。
pinyin: Tā juédìng xiàng péngyou de cāntīng rùgǔ.
english: He decided to invest in his friend's restaurant.

sentence: 老师奖赏了表现优秀的学生。
pinyin: Lǎoshī jiǎngshǎng le biǎoxiàn yōuxiù de xuésheng.
english: The teacher rewarded the students who performed excellently.

pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì yào huā bù shǎo yínzi.
english: This matter will cost a good deal of money.

sentence: 他很有幽默感，大家都喜欢和他聊天。
pinyin: Tā hěn yǒu yōumògǎn, dàjiā dōu xǐhuān hé tā liáotiān.
english: He has a great sense of humor; everyone loves chatting with him.

sentence: 这件外套只剩大码了，你要吗？
pinyin: Zhè jiàn wàitào zhǐ shèng dàmǎ le, nǐ yào ma?
english: This jacket only has large size left; do you want it?
